safeVersionEvidence: The one-shot runner emits only the bounded major.minor server version after the test verifies the connected database, public schema, and PostgreSQL 18 server.
targetCoverage: catalog normalization and all 36 CHECK identities
behavioral probes and semantic mutations for the seven PostgreSQL 18 deparsing cases
two partial-index behavior and mutation probes
all 22 physical indexes valid and ready
true failed-verifier ledger and same-checksum recovery
compensation refusal, legacy preservation, cleanup, and reapply
reasonNotRun: No existing local PostgreSQL 18 or container runtime is available. The committed target has not been built or deployed because Gate R, Gate G, and Gate V remain incomplete or unapproved.
